name: Publicly Accessible Azure MySQL Single Servers with no/old TLS
query: { mySqlServers( where: { AND: [ { publicAccessBlocked: { eq: false } } { firewallRules_SOME: { startIPAddress: { eq: "0.0.0.0" } endIPAddress: { eq: "255.255.255.255" } } } { OR: [ { tlsStatus: { eq: "disabled" } } { tlsMinimumVersion_LT: 1.2 } ] } ] } ) {...AssetFragment tlsStatus tlsMinimumVersion} }
